name: @parcha/hands-free
description: Hands-free for coding agents: the agent phones you (as Unc) when it needs an answer. Pure skill + one script — no hooks. Claude Code and Codex.

scripts.test: python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v && python3 -m py_compile scripts/hands_free_hook.py skills/hands-free/scripts/hands_free_hook.py && python3 -m json.tool .codex-plugin/plugin.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool hooks/hooks.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool examples/hooks.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool examples/claude-settings.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool .agents/plugins/marketplace.json >/dev/null
